translations.pt: Estou levando a caixa para fora.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mang cái thùng ra ngoài.
translations.nl: Ik draag de kist naar buiten.
translations.hi: मैं बक्सा बाहर ले जा रहा हूँ।
translations.ja: 箱を外に運んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; functions as the subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; selects an accusative object (‘die Kiste’) and combines with the separable particle ‘raus’ to express movement outward.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative marking the direct object (‘Kiste’).
Common noun; feminine, accusative singular; direct object of ‘trage’.
Separable verbal particle indicating direction (‘out’); forms a separable verb with ‘tragen’ (‘raus tragen’).

sentences.target: Die Kiste passt nicht ins Auto.

translations.de: Die Kiste passt nicht ins Auto.
translations.en: The box doesn't fit in the car.
translations.es: La caja no cabe en el coche.
translations.fr: La caisse ne rentre pas dans la voiture.
translations.it: La cassetta non entra in macchina.
translations.pt: A caixa não cabe no carro.
translations.vi: Cái thùng không vừa vào xe.
translations.nl: De kist past niet in de auto.
translations.hu: A láda nem fér be az autóba.
translations.pl: Skrzynka nie mieści się w samochodzie.
translations.el: Το κιβώτιο δεν χωράει στο αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: Kassa får ikke plass i bilen.
translations.id: Kotak itu tidak muat di mobil.
translations.sv: Lådan får inte plats i bilen.
translations.da: Kassen kan ikke være i bilen.

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative marking the subject (‘Kiste’).
Common noun; feminine, nominative singular; subject of ‘passt’.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; intransitive, takes a prepositional complement (‘ins Auto’).
Negation particle; scopes over the verb phrase, negating ‘passt’.
Preposition contracted with the article (‘in + das’), governing accusative to indicate direction into a container (‘ins Auto’).
Common noun; neuter, accusative singular; object of the preposition ‘ins’.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester bemalt die Kiste bunt.

translations.de: Meine Schwester bemalt die Kiste bunt.
translations.en: My sister is painting the box in bright colors.
translations.es: Mi hermana está pintando la caja de colores vivos.
translations.fr: Ma sœur peint la caisse avec des couleurs vives.
translations.it: Mia sorella sta dipingendo la cassetta con colori vivaci.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹正在把箱子涂得五颜六色。
translations.yue: 我阿妹喺度將個箱畫到五顏六色。
translations.ru: Моя сестра раскрашивает коробку яркими цветами.
translations.pt: Minha irmã está pintando a caixa com cores vivas.
translations.he: אחותי צובעת את הקופסה בצבעים עזים.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi đang sơn cái thùng với màu sắc rực rỡ.
translations.nl: Mijn zus verft de kist in felle kleuren.
translations.uk: Моя сестра розмальовує ящик яскравими кольорами.
translations.hu: A lánytestvérem színesre festi a ládát.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन बक्से को चमकीले रंगों में रंग रही है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra maluje skrzynkę w jaskrawych kolorach.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου βάφει το κιβώτιο με έντονα χρώματα.
translations.nb: Søsteren min maler kassa i sterke farger.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya sedang mengecat kotak itu dengan warna-warna cerah.
translations.sv: Min syster målar lådan i starka färger.
translations.ro: Sora mea vopsește lada în culori vii.
translations.cs: Moje sestra maluje bednu pestrými barvami.
translations.da: Min søster maler kassen i stærke farver.
translations.ja: 妹が箱を鮮やかな色で塗っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative; modifies ‘Schwester’ (possessor is the speaker).
Common noun; feminine, nominative singular; subject of ‘bemalt’.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; transitive, takes an accusative object (‘die Kiste’) and allows an object-related resultative (‘bunt’).
Definite article; feminine singular accusative marking the direct object (‘Kiste’).
Common noun; feminine, accusative singular; direct object of ‘bemalt’.
Adjective, positive degree; secondary predicate/resultative complement describing the painted state of the object.

sentences.target: In der Kiste liegen alte Fotos.

translations.de: In der Kiste liegen alte Fotos.
translations.en: There are old photos in the box.
translations.es: En la caja hay fotos antiguas.
translations.fr: Il y a de vieilles photos dans la caisse.
translations.it: Nella cassetta ci sono vecchie foto.
translations.vi: Trong cái thùng có những tấm ảnh cũ.
translations.nl: In de kist liggen oude foto's.
translations.el: Μέσα στο κιβώτιο υπάρχουν παλιές φωτογραφίες.
translations.nb: I kassa ligger det gamle bilder.
translations.id: Di dalam kotak itu ada foto-foto lama.
translations.da: I kassen ligger der gamle billeder.
translations.ja: 箱の中に古い写真があります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; with locative meaning it governs dative (‘in der Kiste’), introducing a locative PP.
Definite article; feminine singular dative with ‘Kiste’ as object of the preposition.
Common noun; feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘in’ within the locative PP.
Finite main verb, 3rd person plural present indicative; intransitive stative verb indicating location; agrees with plural subject ‘Fotos’.
Attributive adjective; plural nominative (strong inflection) modifying ‘Fotos’.
Common noun; plural nominative; subject of ‘liegen’.

Meine Schwester bemalt die Kiste bunt.
In der Kiste liegen alte Fotos.

Meine Schwester bemalt die Kiste bunt.
In der Kiste liegen alte Fotos.
en: The box doesn't fit in the car.
My sister is painting the box in bright colors.
There are old photos in the box.
